title: Email Marketing Prompt Pack — 80+ AI Prompts for High-Converting Emails
subtitle: Welcome sequences, nurture campaigns, sales emails & win-back flows — all AI-generated.
description:
Email marketing delivers $36 for every $1 spent. But only if people open your emails.

80+ AI prompts that generate high-converting emails for every funnel stage.

What's inside:
• 10 Welcome Sequence prompts
• 15 Nurture Campaign prompts
• 20 Sales Sequence prompts (AIDA, PAS, BAB, 4Ps frameworks)
• 15 Newsletter Template prompts
• 10 Win-Back & Re-engagement prompts
• 10 Subject Line Generator prompts

Includes 4 proven email frameworks: AIDA, PAS, BAB, and 4 Ps templates.

Format: PDF + Notion page
Updates: Free lifetime updates
